msdyn_dataflow.msdyn_mashupdocument:
section Section1; shared Zeitachse = let StartDate = #date(2026, 1, 1), EndDate = #date(2050, 12, 31),
DateList = List.Dates(StartDate, Duration.Days(EndDate - StartDate) + 1, #duration(1,0,0,0)),
#"To Table" = Table.FromList(DateList, Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Datum"}), #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"To Table", {{"Datum", type date}}),
#"Added Columns" = Table.AddColumn(#"Changed Type", "DateInt", each Number.From(Date.ToText([Datum], "yyyyMMdd"))),
#"Added KW" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Columns", "KW", each Date.WeekOfYear([Datum], Day.Monday)),
#"Added Monat No" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added KW", "Monat No", each Date.Month([Datum])),
#"Added Monat" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Monat No", "Monat", each Date.ToText([Datum], "MMMM", "de-CH")),
#"Added Monatsbeginn" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Monat", "Monatsbeginn", each Date.StartOfMonth([Datum])),
#"Added Monat+Jahr" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Monatsbeginn", "Monat+Jahr", each Date.ToText([Datum], "MMM yyyy", "de-CH")),
#"Added Quartal No" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Monat+Jahr", "Quartal No", each Date.QuarterOfYear([Datum])),
#"Added Quartal" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Quartal No", "Quartal", each "Q" & Text.From(Date.QuarterOfYear([Datum]))),
#"Added Quartal+Jahr" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Quartal", "Quartal+Jahr", each "Q" & Text.From(Date.QuarterOfYear([Datum])) & " " & Text.From(Date.Year([Datum]))),
#"Added Geschäftsjahr" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Quartal+Jahr", "Geschäftsjahr", each Date.Year([Datum])),
#"Added Referenzjahr" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Geschäftsjahr", "Referenzjahr", each Date.Year([Datum])),
#"Added Tag der Woche" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Referenzjahr", "Tag der Woche", each Date.ToText([Datum], "dddd", "de-CH")),
#"Added Wochentag No" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Tag der Woche", "Wochentag No", each Date.DayOfWeek([Datum], Day.Monday) + 1),
#"Added Tag des Jahres" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Wochentag No", "Tag des Jahres", each Date.DayOfYear([Datum])),
#"Added Woche" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Tag des Jahres", "Woche", each Date.WeekOfYear([Datum], Day.Monday)),
#"Added Woche+Jahr" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Woche", "Woche+Jahr", each Text.From(Date.WeekOfYear([Datum], Day.Monday)) & "/" & Text.From(Date.Year([Datum]))), #"Added WeekEnding" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Woche+Jahr", "WeekEnding", each Date.EndOfWeek([Datum], Day.Monday)),
#"Added WeekEnding-7" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added WeekEnding", "WeekEnding-7", each Date.AddDays(Date.EndOfWeek([Datum], Day.Monday), -7)),
#"Added Week + Day" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added WeekEnding-7", "Week + Day", each "KW" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Date.WeekOfYear([Datum], Day.Monday)), 2, "0") & " - " & Date.ToText([Datum], "ddd", "de-CH")),
#"Added Datum-7" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Week + Day", "Datum-7", each Date.AddDays([Datum], -7)),
#"Added Zeitfilter" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Datum-7", "Zeitfilter", each Date.Year([Datum])),
#"Added Zeitfilter Vorgestern" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Zeitfilter", "Zeitfilter Vorgestern", each Date.AddDays(DateTime.Date(DateTime.LocalNow()), -2)),
#"Added Filter +-3 Tage" = Table.AddColumn(#"Added Zeitfilter Vorgestern", "Filter +-3 Tage von heute", each if [Datum] >= Date.AddDays(DateTime.Date(DateTime.LocalNow()), -3) and [Datum] <= Date.AddDays(DateTime.Date(DateTime.LocalNow()), 3) then true else false), #"Andere Spalten entfernt" = Table.SelectColumns(#"Added Filter +-3 Tage", {"Datum", "DateInt", "KW", "Monat No", "Monat", "Monatsbeginn", "Monat+Jahr", "Tag der Woche", "Wochentag No", "Tag des Jahres", "Woche", "Woche+Jahr"}), #"Geänderter Spaltentyp" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Andere Spalten entfernt", {{"DateInt", Int64.Type}, {"KW", Int64.Type}, {"Monat No", Int64.Type}, {"Monat", type text}, {"Monatsbeginn", type date}, {"Monat+Jahr", type text}, {"Tag der Woche", type text}, {"Wochentag No", Int64.Type}, {"Tag des Jahres", Int64.Type}, {"Woche", Int64.Type}, {"Woche+Jahr", type text}}), #"Duplizierte Spalte" = Table.DuplicateColumn(#"Geänderter Spaltentyp", "Datum", "Datum – text"), #"Geänderter Spaltentyp 1" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Duplizierte Spalte", {{"Datum – text", type text}})
in #"Geänderter Spaltentyp 1"; shared account = let Source = CommonDataService.Database("hrsandbox.crm17.dynamics.com"), #"Navigation 1" = Source{[Schema = "dbo", Item = "account"]}[Data] in #"Navigation 1";
